heading: Repealed. , title I, § 1,Aug. 27, 1935, ch. 74049 Stat. 872
label: 101 to 108 Repealed. , title I, § 1,Aug. 27, 1935, ch. 74049 Stat. 872
notes: Section 101, , , provided that this chapter may be cited as the “Prohibition Reorganization Act of 1930”.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 146 Stat. 427

Section 102, , , established a Bureau of Prohibition in Department of Justice and authorized appointment of a Director and Assistant Director of Prohibition and designation of officers and employees.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 246 Stat. 427
Section 103, , , related to creation of an enforcement division in Bureau of Prohibition in Treasury Department.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 346 Stat. 428
Section 104, , , related to imposition of duties on Attorney General with respect to enforcement of prohibition laws.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 446 Stat. 428

Section 105, acts , ; , , authorized Attorney General and Secretary of the Treasury to jointly prescribe regulations relating to permits and prescriptions for liquor for medicinal purposes.May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 546 Stat. 429Mar. 31, 1933, ch. 18, § 448 Stat. 24

Section 106, , , related to filing of reports by Attorney General with Secretary of the Treasury with respect to civil liabilities for taxes and penalties and filing of reports by Secretary of the Treasury with Attorney General with respect to revocation of permits.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 646 Stat. 429
Section 107, , , related to grant, renewal, and amendment of permits.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 746 Stat. 429

Section 108, , , provided that Bureau of Prohibition shall hereafter be known as Bureau of Industrial Alcohol, and Commissioner of Prohibition shall hereafter have title of Commissioner of Industrial Alcohol.act May 27, 1930, ch. 342, § 846 Stat. 430
